intro: To the distant edge of the galaxy
The wind carries memories of distant days
The moment of departure is now
Thousands of stars are gazing into your eyes
A voice calls from beyond the starry sea
The door of memory gently opens
The premonition of beginning fills the sky
The first step on the eternal journey
In the silent cosmos, stars are born
verse: The crimson light染ing the horizon
Tells us a new dawn has arrived
Yet somehow, loneliness lights up in my heart
From the far side of the path we walked yesterday
More certain than words, your silhouette
I’ve only followed in silence
On the map drawn from fragments of dreams
Tomorrow we should meet someday lies hidden
If only on some nameless page of history
I could etch the proof that we lived together
Toward the side where light pours through the heavy door
Let us sail onward on the ship called hope
Searching for a name amid the passing crowds
The answer always vanishes into the wind
In the corner of memory, you smile at me
Only that distant promise burns in my chest
Time flows on, stars circle round
Only unchanging feelings remain here
A boat rowing out across the sea called solitude
Will surely reach the other shore someday
The traces of dreams seen beyond the battlefield
Still held tightly in my heart, never forgotten
The warmth of that day we shared together
Even across time, it will never fade
This road that stretches to the galaxy’s end
Keep walking forward without looking back
The number of tears makes us stronger, they say
I believe those words someone once spoke
Even with wounded wings, we can still fly
Toward the light called tomorrow
Searching for the shadows of days gone by
Gazing at the starry sky as night deepens
Though we know fate will scatter and fall
Flowers bloom proudly until life’s final breath
Even if eternal farewell awaits ahead
In this moment, I still want to live
pre_chorus: Ah, like crossing the river of time
Like the bell that signals the beginning
The rising heartbeat proclaims the future
In the silence, I hear a voice
Let us walk guided by its call
O wind, show me the distant view
chorus: Traveler, where do you go?
To the farthest edge of the galaxy
Those tears, those dreams
Will become eternal light
My friend, farewell—I will never forget
The days we lived side by side
Even beyond the stardust
Your soul continues to shine
The proof of your life
Burns within the pages of history
At the end of the eternal journey
Until the day we meet again
In the quietly flowing stream of time
Surrender and press onward
The prayers of nameless warriors
Light up the stars
O galaxy, resound forever
Carry our song upon the wind
Across space and time, deliver this feeling
Until the day we reunite
As long as life endures, the journey continues
Sailing into the boundless cosmos
Farewell is the poem of a new beginning
Set sail under the name of hope
The dream we saw together will not vanish
It shines forever in the universe of the heart
Even apart, beneath the same starry sky
Let us gaze upward eternally
bridge: If I could be born again
I wish once more beneath this starry sky
To talk through the night of endless dreams with you
Cross over the bridge of light and go forward
Looking back, the homeland fades into haze
Yet still I reach out my hand
Every parting is merely
The prelude to a new beginning
You taught me this truth
Though time flows and people change
Unchanging feelings remain here
Holding your image close to my heart
I continue on this eternal path
Asking the starry sky, yet the answer
Fades away into the wind
Still I will search forever
Seeking the true light
Amid repeated meetings and farewells
Every person is a traveler
Unfold the map within your heart
Head toward the unknown world
interlude: Silence descends, the lingering echo of strings drifts
Far away, the sound of stars being born and extinguished
The journey of the heart continues still
I can hear the breath of the galaxy
In this moment where time seems to stand still
An eternal melody resounds through all
outro: On the paths each of us will take
The gentle wave of your hand
Will live forever within this chest
Someday at the edge of this galaxy
The eternal tale told by the stars
Carved into the heart, set forth
Until the day we meet again, farewell
Waiting for you beyond the galaxy
